0.q: our results suggest that overexpression of the MbNAC25 gene could scavenge the intracellular reactive oxygen species (ROS) by increasing the enzyme activities of SOD, POD and CAT.

2.q: the expression of both ABA-independent and ABA-dependent stress-induced genes (COR15a and rd29B, respectively) was activated under normal growth conditions in Arabidopsis overexpressing MbDREB1.
